Our agency

  • Home

  • Who we are

Your next home.

Four Walls is an estate agency in the heart of Thessaloniki, built on personal service and deep knowledge of the local market.

Get in touch
Who we are

We started with a simple idea: to do estate agency properly — with transparency and a personal touch. We know the city centre, Oraiokastro and the wider Thessaloniki market inside out, and our valuations are grounded in real, neighbourhood-level data.

Our mission

To make the most of every property: with transparency, no hidden costs and none of the unnecessary hassle.

We're here to help you
find your home

Get started with us in a few simple steps.

Get in touch

Tell us what you're looking for or what you'd like to put on the market.

Selection & viewing

We suggest properties and arrange the viewings.

Completion

Negotiation, legal due diligence and signing, with support at every step.

What our clients say

Our clients' satisfaction says it all.

They really know their field and are very courteous — they stand out!
Thanos Giouvanoudis, Local Guide · 19 reviews
Excellent!!!
Petros Tryfon, 7 reviews
Very courteous, very professional in their work and, above all, they listen to your needs!
Panagiotis Athanasiadis, Local Guide · 24 reviews

Fragkini 9, 54624 Thessaloniki, Greece
